top3.sql:
SELECT 
    p_promo_name,
    s_store_name,
    SUM(ss_ext_sales_price) AS total_sales
FROM 
    store_sales
    JOIN date_dim ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
    JOIN store ON ss_store_sk = s_store_sk
    JOIN promotion ON ss_promo_sk = p_promo_sk
    JOIN item ON ss_item_sk = i_item_sk
WHERE 
    d_date BETWEEN '2000-01-27' AND '2000-04-26'
    AND i_manufact_id = 350
GROUP BY 
    p_promo_name,
    s_store_name
ORDER BY 
    total_sales DESC,
    p_promo_name,
    s_store_name
LIMIT 100

final.sql:
SELECT 
    p_promo_name,
    s_store_name,
    SUM(ss_ext_sales_price) AS total_sales
FROM 
    store_sales
    JOIN date_dim ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
    JOIN store ON ss_store_sk = s_store_sk
    JOIN promotion ON ss_promo_sk = p_promo_sk
    JOIN item ON ss_item_sk = i_item_sk
WHERE 
    d_date BETWEEN '2000-01-27' AND '2000-04-26'
    AND i_manufact_id = 350
GROUP BY 
    p_promo_name,
    s_store_name
ORDER BY 
    total_sales DESC,
    p_promo_name,
    s_store_name
LIMIT 100
